name: cost-aware-router
tagline: OpenAI-compatible proxy that routes simple requests to local Ollama, complex ones to cloud — ~44% savings on a public benchmark.

name: memorystore
tagline: Self-hosted MCP-native memory backend for AI assistants. SQLite + sqlite-vec, Ollama embeddings, zero external network calls — 86% top-1 recall on a 50-question benchmark.
